title: TC4 wand focus behavior parity batch

fire.adapter: beam/ray fire damage, ignition, block fire placement

frost.adapter: ray frost damage, slow, extinguish, snow/ice placement

shock.adapter: ray lightning damage, weakness, chain pulse

equal_trade.adapter: original-style connected swap / architect plane selection using wand areax/areay/areaz/aread and picked block NBT; offhand remains Forge 1.19.2 fallback adapter until original pick UI is restored

primal.adapter: TC4PrimalOrbEntity projectile impact/seeker behavior adapter; no Stage171 fake ray effect remains

stage177_update.equal_trade_adapter: replaced Stage171 3x3 planar placeholder with original WandManager/IArchitect area NBT and connected-swap traversal in FocusArchitectRuntime
stage177_update.primal_adapter: Stage178 moved primal impact behavior into TC4PrimalOrbEntity and removed Stage171 placeholder ray effect methods
